     The Numbers Business Report

Alex Cross (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,888,412Details
International Box Office $9,538,347
Worldwide Box Office $35,426,759
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,250,659
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,180,149
Total $16,430,808
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Alex Cross reboots the movie series that started with the movie Along Came A Spider and Kiss the Girls. The story takes Alex Cross back to show the origins of the character as a Detroit police department detective. His lifelong friend Tommy Kane is also his partner and the two also work with detective Monica Ashe, who gets caught up in the chase for the serial killer nicknamed Picasso. Picasso's ultimate target is Detroit‐based multi‐national industrialist Giles Mercier but what appears as obvious, is anything but, as Cross has to try to get into a killer’s head to anticipate what could be next and to check the violent urges that Picasso has brought out in him.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,396,768 (44.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:73.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,539 opening theaters/2,541 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,897,078

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 19th, 2012 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: October 17th, 2012 (Wide) (Philippines)
October 18th, 2012 (Wide) (Croatia)
October 18th, 2012 (Wide) (Ukraine)
October 18th, 2012 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 19th, 2012 (Wide) (Vietnam)
Video Release: February 5th, 2013 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence including disturbing images, sexual content, language, drug references, and nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2215, 3/21/2012)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Reboot
Plot point: African Americans, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Hitmen, Mafia, Mixed Martial Arts, Non-Chronological, Police Procedural, Revenge, Serial Killer, Sex Crimes, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Block/Hanson, James Patterson Entertainment, Emmett/Furla Films, Envision Media, Summit Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Alex Cross reboots the movie series that started with the movie Along Came A Spider and Kiss the Girls. The story takes Alex Cross back to show the origins of the character as a Detroit police department detective. His lifelong friend Tommy Kane is also his partner and the two also work with detective Monica Ashe, who gets caught up in the chase for the serial killer nicknamed Picasso. Picasso's ultimate target is Detroit‐based multi‐national industrialist Giles Mercier but what appears as obvious, is anything but, as Cross has to try to get into a killer’s head to anticipate what could be next and to check the violent urges that Picasso has brought out in him.
